prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第30名持续上升至2026年第24名，近年排名稳步提 升，反映学校综合实力增强，对高分考生吸引力上升；2024年曾出现投档线暴跌约500名的负面舆情（招生沟通不畅、专业设置争议），但2025–2026年声誉信号 已恢复平稳；抖音热度总排名第13（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；第五轮学科评估中，作物学、兽医学、畜牧学、草学、食品科学与工程获A+， 植物保护、生物学获A，共7个A-/A/A+学科，农林学科实力顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高 热推荐，与该校计算机类、电子信息类等招生专业契合；本省2026年普通高考总人数约39.37万，按近年比例估算物理类约25.2万人，较2025年（约24.98万）小幅增加约0.9%，竞 争略有加剧，2025年物理类本科批426分，近年波动不大；中国农业大学位于北京，属一线城市高校，对湖北考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在 本省招生规模较大（2026年物理类102人），属外省在京高校中招生较多的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次16067名、2026年大幅扩招23.5%将显著推后位次、软 科排名持续上升增强吸引力、抖音高热反映关注度提升、本省考生小幅增加等因素，扩招是主导因素，但学校层次提升和热度上升部分抵消扩招影响；预测2026年物理类最低位次 约18045名，区间17545–18545名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 15971 → 14468 → 16315 → 15356 → 16067, showing a fluctuating trend with a range of about 1847 positions over the past five years; the 2025 baseline is about 16067, which is about 711 positions lower than 2024, at a medium level in recent years; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 73 in 2021, 83 in 2022, 83 in 2023, 76 in 2024, and 85 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 102, an increase of 20 students (about 23.5%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that will intensify competition and push rankings lower.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased appeal to high-scoring students; in 2024, there was negative publicity about a sharp drop of about 500 positions in admission scores (due to poor enrollment communication and controversial major settings), but by 2025–2026, reputation signals have stabilized; Douyin popularity ranks 13th overall (high heat), with large short video exposure and high application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science, Veterinary Medicine, Animal Science, Grassland Science, and Food Science and Engineering received A+, Plant Protection and Biology received A, totaling 7 A-/A/A+ disciplines, with top-tier agricultural and forestry disciplines strongly attracting related major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the university's Computer Science and Electronic Information majors; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 393,700, with an estimated Physics Category of about 252,000 based on recent proportions, a slight increase of about 0.9% from 2025 (about 249,800), slightly intensifying competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 426 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, with strong regional appeal to Hubei students; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in the province (102 in Physics Category in 2026), making it one of the universities with higher enrollment among those from other provinces in Beijing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 16067, the significant 23.5% expansion in 2026 will notably push rankings lower, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhances appeal, Douyin's high heat reflects increased attention, and a slight increase in provincial examinees, the expansion is the dominant factor, but the improvement in school level and popularity partially offset the expansion's impact; the predicted 2026 Physics Category minimum ranking is about 18045, with a range of 17545–18545.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 18045, with a range of 17545–18545. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 17545) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Science Experimental Class, Computer Science, Electronic Information); those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 18000) are advised to primarily target Tier 2 majors (Mechanical Engineering, Veterinary Medicine, Food Science and Engineering, etc., advantageous disciplines), while also considering Tier 1 sprinting; candidates with rankings at the upper end of the range (around 18545) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net (Yantai Research Institute-related majors), while also striving for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 经济学类/金融/财经类社会热度分化观望 ，工商管理类明显劝退，文科类专业整体热度一般；本省2026年普通高考总人数约39.37万，按近年比例估算历史类约14.17万人，较2025年（约14.14万）基本持平；省控线2025 年历史类本科批442分，近年波动不大；中国农业大学位于北京，对湖北文科考生有一定地域吸引力；该校历史类招生规模较小（2026年21人），竞争格局相对 稳定。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2904 → 2455 → 2821 → 2951 → 3324, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The 2025 ranking of 3324 is the highest (worst) in the past five years, moving back about 373 places compared to 2024. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 4 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 11 in 2024, and further to 21 in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 21, the same as 2025, indicating a pause in expansion and no further easing of competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2024, there was a negative public opinion due to a sharp drop in admission scores, but by 2025–2026, the reputation signal has recovered to stability. The university ranks 13th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with overall high attention. It is known for agriculture and forestry disciplines, but its liberal arts majors (Economics, Business Administration, Public Administration, Marketing, E-commerce, Rural Regional Development) have low relevance to its strong disciplines, with limited disciplinary evaluation support. It is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science list has steadily risen from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, which also attracts some liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social heat for Economics/Finance/Financial majors is divided and cautious, while Business Administration is clearly discouraged, and liberal arts majors overall have average popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is about 393,700, with an estimated 141,700 in History Category (similar to 2025's 141,400). The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 442 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal for liberal arts candidates from Hubei. The university's History Category enrollment scale is small (21 in 2026), making the competition pattern relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3324, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the recent trend of backward movement in rankings, the stable number of provincial candidates, and the average popularity of liberal arts majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move back from 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3354, with a range of 2876–3832.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 3354, range 2876–3832. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 2876) can focus on Tier 1 majors (Economics, Rural Regional Development, Business Administration); those in the middle of the range (around 3350) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors (Public Administration); those near the upper end (around 3832) should consider Tier 3 majors (Marketing, E-commerce) as safety options.
